name: autoresearch
description: Run an evolutionary self-improvement loop (inspired by Andrej Karpathy's autoresearch) to iteratively mutate, execute, and optimize a target file to maximize or minimize a specific metric.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: target_file
parameters.description: Path to the file to optimize (relative to workspace)

parameters.name: eval_cmd
parameters.description: Shell command to run the benchmark or tests (e.g. 'python benchmark.py')

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: The metric key to parse from the output (e.g. 'time', 'loss', 'throughput')

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: min (to minimize, e.g. loss/time) or max (to maximize, e.g. accuracy/throughput)

parameters.name: iterations
parameters.description: Number of evolutionary iteration loops (default is 10)
